record.field:
Where community decisions take shape

Elevate your next gathering in our state-of-the-art meeting room. Designed with productivity and natural light in mind, this space offers a seamless blend of modern architecture and functional design. 

Whether you are hosting a Property Owners Association (POA) general meeting or a private corporate workshop, our suite provides a neutral, professional environment that fosters focus and collaboration.

  • Surface Area: 65 m² (700 sq. ft.)
  • Capacity: Up to 30 people (Boardroom or Classroom style)
  • Key Features: Integrated AV system with 4K display, high-speed municipal Wi-Fi, climate control, and ergonomic seating.
  • Ideal For: Board meetings, strategic planning sessions, HOA/POA assemblies, educational workshops, and small-scale seminars.

65 m² (700 sq. ft.)
Up to 30 people (boardroom or classroom style)

An open-air venue for community connection

Breathe fresh air into your next event at the civic green. 

This meticulously landscaped outdoor space at the rear of City Hall is designed to be a safe, vibrant "town square." It features lush lawn areas perfect for wooden lawn games like Mölkky, alongside paved sections ideal for lottery booths or catering stations. It’s a place where the community gathers to play, learn, and celebrate under the sun or stars.

  • Surface Area: 1,200 m² (13,000 sq. ft.)
  • Capacity: 350+ people (Flexible open-air layout).
  • Key Features: Outdoor power outlets for PA systems, accessible paved pathways, night-time bistro lighting, and integrated bench seating.
  • Ideal For: School garden fétes, fundraiser lotteries, farmers' markets, outdoor concerts, yoga in the park, and community family days.

1,200 m² (13,000 sq. ft.)
350+ people (flexible open-air layout).

Celebrate life’s milestones at the heart of the city

The Horizon Hall is our premier indoor venue, offering a breathtaking panoramic view of the city skyline through floor-to-ceiling glass walls. 

This versatile space adapts to your vision, from the elegance of a modern wedding reception with a live folk band to the structured prestige of a civic gala. With its warm wood accents and expansive floor plan, it provides an atmosphere that is both grand and intimate.

  • Surface Area: 280 m² (3,000 sq. ft.)
  • Capacity: 180 seated guests / 250 standing for cocktail receptions.
  • Key Features: Professional acoustic treatment, dedicated stage area for bands or speakers, adjustable ambient lighting, and direct access to a commercial-grade catering prep kitchen.
  • Ideal For: Weddings, community banquets, corporate award ceremonies, cultural performances, and non-profit fundraisers.

280 m² (3,000 sq. ft.)
Up to 180 seated guests / 250 standing for cocktail receptions
